text:
Sorry, but I made typo:
's/OVERRIDE_LINUX_NONBASE_PORTS/OVERRIDE_LINUX_BASE_PORT/g'
I've copied this string from www/linux-opera/Makefile (btw this has to
be corrected there too) and dont have any FBSD7 host to test it. I'm
so sorry!

Please take this patch with correction
